fa-clarinet.appearanceId: long slender cylindrical wind instrument with tone holes along the body and a flared bell at one end; tapered woodwind tube with a mouthpiece at the narrow top
fa-clarinet.functionalityId: inserts or selects a clarinet instrument symbol; tags content with a woodwind or classical music theme
fa-clarinet.intentId: represent woodwind or orchestral music; categorize content related to clarinet playing or music education

fa-claw-marks.appearanceId: four parallel diagonal slash lines angled as if raked by sharp claws; scratched swipe marks in a downward-slanting row
fa-claw-marks.functionalityId: inserts a claw or scratch mark symbol; tags content with a wild animal or damage theme
fa-claw-marks.intentId: represent danger, a predator, or a scratched surface; indicate animal attack or horror-themed content

fa-clinic-medical.appearanceId: building facade with a prominent medical cross emblem centered on the front; rectangular structure outline with a plus-sign badge on the face
fa-clinic-medical.functionalityId: opens clinic or medical facility information; navigates to a healthcare location or service
fa-clinic-medical.intentId: find or access a medical clinic; locate nearby healthcare services or facilities

fa-clipboard.appearanceId: rectangular board with a curved top clip bar centered at the top edge; flat writing surface with a horizontal fastener clamp
fa-clipboard.functionalityId: opens a clipboard or notes panel; pastes copied content into the current context
fa-clipboard.intentId: view or manage copied or recorded notes; access a clipboard of stored content

fa-clipboard-check.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with a checkmark overlaid on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with a tick mark on the face
fa-clipboard-check.functionalityId: marks a task or checklist item as complete; confirms and submits a clipboard form
fa-clipboard-check.intentId: verify or approve completed tasks on a list; confirm that a recorded item has been checked off

fa-clipboard-list.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with two or three horizontal lines representing list items on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with stacked text rows on the face
fa-clipboard-list.functionalityId: opens a task list or itemized checklist on the clipboard; displays a structured list of recorded items
fa-clipboard-list.intentId: review or manage an ordered list of tasks or items; access a structured checklist or to-do record

fa-clipboard-list-check.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with multiple list rows each preceded by a small checkbox or tick mark; flat notepad outline with a checked item list on the face
fa-clipboard-list-check.functionalityId: opens a completed or verified checklist on the clipboard; marks all listed tasks as done
fa-clipboard-list-check.intentId: confirm that all tasks on a recorded list are completed; review a fully checked-off task record

fa-clipboard-medical.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with a medical cross symbol on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with a plus-sign health badge on the face
fa-clipboard-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical record or patient chart clipboard; accesses health-related notes or clinical documentation
fa-clipboard-medical.intentId: review or manage medical records or clinical notes; access patient health information on a chart

fa-clipboard-prescription.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with an Rx prescription symbol on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with a pharmacist's Rx mark on the face
fa-clipboard-prescription.functionalityId: opens or fills in a prescription record; accesses medication prescription documentation
fa-clipboard-prescription.intentId: manage or view a medical prescription; record or retrieve a doctor's medication order

fa-clipboard-question.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with a question mark on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with an interrogation symbol on the face
fa-clipboard-question.functionalityId: opens a survey form or questionnaire on the clipboard; prompts the user to answer recorded questions
fa-clipboard-question.intentId: fill out or review an unanswered questionnaire or form; access a clipboard with pending questions

fa-clipboard-user.appearanceId: clipboard board shape with a person silhouette on the writing surface; flat notepad outline with a user profile figure on the face
fa-clipboard-user.functionalityId: opens a patient or user profile form on the clipboard; accesses a personnel record or intake document
fa-clipboard-user.intentId: view or manage a person's recorded profile or intake form; access user-specific documentation on a clipboard

fa-clock.appearanceId: circular clock face outline with two hands indicating a time; round dial with hour and minute hands
fa-clock.functionalityId: displays or sets the current time; opens a time-picker or scheduling tool
fa-clock.intentId: check or record the current time; access time-management or scheduling features

fa-clock-desk.appearanceId: rounded desk clock body with a flat base stand and a clock face on the front; small standing tabletop timepiece silhouette
fa-clock-desk.functionalityId: opens a desk clock widget or time display; sets a countdown or alarm on a desk-style timer
fa-clock-desk.intentId: display the current time as a desk clock; manage a tabletop timer or office scheduling reminder

fa-clock-eight.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 8 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 8:00
fa-clock-eight.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to eight o'clock; stamps an event or record with an 8:00 time marker
fa-clock-eight.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 8:00; schedule something at eight o'clock

fa-clock-eight-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 8 and 9 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 8:30
fa-clock-eight-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to eight-thirty; stamps an event or record with an 8:30 time marker
fa-clock-eight-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 8:30; schedule something at half past eight

fa-clock-eleven.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 11 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 11:00
fa-clock-eleven.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to eleven o'clock; stamps an event or record with an 11:00 time marker
fa-clock-eleven.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 11:00; schedule something at eleven o'clock

fa-clock-eleven-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 11 and 12 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 11:30
fa-clock-eleven-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to eleven-thirty; stamps an event or record with an 11:30 time marker
fa-clock-eleven-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 11:30; schedule something at half past eleven

fa-clock-five.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 5 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 5:00
fa-clock-five.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to five o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 5:00 time marker
fa-clock-five.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 5:00; schedule something at five o'clock

fa-clock-five-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 5 and 6 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 5:30
fa-clock-five-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to five-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 5:30 time marker
fa-clock-five-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 5:30; schedule something at half past five

fa-clock-four-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to four-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 4:30 time marker
fa-clock-four-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 4:30; schedule something at half past four

fa-clock-nine.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to nine o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 9:00 time marker
fa-clock-nine.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 9:00; schedule something at nine o'clock

fa-clock-nine-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 9 and 10 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 9:30
fa-clock-nine-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to nine-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 9:30 time marker
fa-clock-nine-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 9:30; schedule something at half past nine

fa-clock-one.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to one o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 1:00 time marker
fa-clock-one.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 1:00; schedule something at one o'clock

fa-clock-one-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 1 and 2 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 1:30
fa-clock-one-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to one-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 1:30 time marker
fa-clock-one-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 1:30; schedule something at half past one

fa-clock-seven.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 7 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 7:00
fa-clock-seven.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to seven o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 7:00 time marker
fa-clock-seven.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 7:00; schedule something at seven o'clock

fa-clock-seven-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 7 and 8 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 7:30
fa-clock-seven-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to seven-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 7:30 time marker
fa-clock-seven-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 7:30; schedule something at half past seven

fa-clock-six.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 6 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 6:00
fa-clock-six.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to six o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 6:00 time marker
fa-clock-six.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 6:00; schedule something at six o'clock

fa-clock-six-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 6 and 7 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 6:30
fa-clock-six-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to six-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 6:30 time marker
fa-clock-six-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 6:30; schedule something at half past six

fa-clock-ten.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 10 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 10:00
fa-clock-ten.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to ten o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 10:00 time marker
fa-clock-ten.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 10:00; schedule something at ten o'clock

fa-clock-ten-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 10 and 11 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 10:30
fa-clock-ten-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to ten-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 10:30 time marker
fa-clock-ten-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 10:30; schedule something at half past ten

fa-clock-three.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand pointing to 3 and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with hands set at exactly 3:00
fa-clock-three.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to three o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 3:00 time marker
fa-clock-three.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 3:00; schedule something at three o'clock

fa-clock-three-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 3 and 4 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 3:30
fa-clock-three-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to three-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 3:30 time marker
fa-clock-three-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 3:30; schedule something at half past three

fa-clock-twelve.appearanceId: circular clock face with both the hour hand and the minute hand pointing straight up to 12; round dial with both hands aligned vertically at the top
fa-clock-twelve.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to twelve o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 12:00 time marker
fa-clock-twelve.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 12:00 noon or midnight; schedule something at twelve o'clock

fa-clock-twelve-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand just past 12 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 12:30
fa-clock-twelve-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to twelve-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 12:30 time marker
fa-clock-twelve-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 12:30; schedule something at half past twelve

fa-clock-two.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to two o'clock; stamps an event or record with a 2:00 time marker
fa-clock-two.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 2:00; schedule something at two o'clock

fa-clock-two-thirty.appearanceId: circular clock face with the hour hand between 2 and 3 and the minute hand pointing straight down to 6; round dial with hands set at 2:30
fa-clock-two-thirty.functionalityId: indicates or sets the time to two-thirty; stamps an event or record with a 2:30 time marker
fa-clock-two-thirty.intentId: represent or log the specific time of 2:30; schedule something at half past two

fa-clone.appearanceId: two overlapping identical rectangles offset diagonally with one slightly behind the other; duplicate stacked document shapes
fa-clone.functionalityId: duplicates or clones the selected element or file; creates an exact copy of the current item
fa-clone.intentId: make a duplicate of an existing item or record; replicate content without modifying the original

fa-close.appearanceId: two diagonal lines crossing at the center forming an X shape; intersecting strokes meeting at a central point
fa-close.functionalityId: closes or dismisses the current dialog, panel, or window; cancels the current action or selection
fa-close.intentId: exit or dismiss the current view or overlay; cancel an operation and return to the previous state

fa-closed-captioning.appearanceId: rounded rectangle containing the bold letters CC; enclosed box badge with a captioning abbreviation
fa-closed-captioning.functionalityId: toggles closed captions on video or media content; enables or disables subtitle text display
fa-closed-captioning.intentId: make video content accessible with text captions; turn on subtitles for hearing-impaired viewers

fa-closed-captioning-slash.appearanceId: rounded rectangle containing the letters CC overlaid with a diagonal slash through the shape; captioning badge crossed out by a strike-through line
fa-closed-captioning-slash.functionalityId: turns off or disables closed captions on video content; removes subtitle text from media playback
fa-closed-captioning-slash.intentId: hide caption text during media playback; disable subtitle accessibility for the current video

fa-clothes-hanger.appearanceId: triangular wire hanger shape with a small hook at the top apex and a horizontal bar at the base; inverted V-shaped garment hook with a straight lower rod
fa-clothes-hanger.functionalityId: opens a wardrobe or clothing management section; tags content with a laundry or apparel category
fa-clothes-hanger.intentId: manage clothing items or a wardrobe; represent fashion, laundry, or apparel-related content

fa-cloud.appearanceId: fluffy rounded cloud outline with three or four lobed bumps along the top and a flat base; puffed cumulus shape with smooth curved edges
fa-cloud.functionalityId: opens cloud storage or online sync settings; uploads or accesses files stored in the cloud
fa-cloud.intentId: store or access files remotely in the cloud; sync data across devices using online storage

fa-cloud-binary.appearanceId: fluffy cloud shape with 0 and 1 digits displayed inside or beneath it; rounded cumulus outline overlaid with binary number symbols
fa-cloud-binary.functionalityId: indicates cloud-based data processing or binary data upload; accesses raw data stored in cloud infrastructure
fa-cloud-binary.intentId: manage or transfer binary or raw data to the cloud; represent cloud computing or data storage for developers

fa-cloud-bolt.appearanceId: fluffy cloud shape with a lightning bolt descending from beneath it; rounded cumulus outline with a jagged electric flash below
fa-cloud-bolt.functionalityId: indicates a thunderstorm weather condition; alerts to a lightning or severe weather event
fa-cloud-bolt.intentId: check or display a thunderstorm weather forecast; warn about lightning or electrical storm conditions

fa-cloud-bolt-moon.appearanceId: crescent moon shape beside a cloud with a lightning bolt descending below; nighttime cumulus outline with a moon crescent and electric flash
fa-cloud-bolt-moon.functionalityId: indicates nighttime thunderstorm weather conditions; displays a nighttime severe weather alert
fa-cloud-bolt-moon.intentId: check the overnight weather forecast for storms; be warned about lightning during nighttime hours

fa-cloud-bolt-sun.appearanceId: sun shape beside a cloud with a lightning bolt descending below; daytime cumulus outline with a sun symbol and electric flash
fa-cloud-bolt-sun.functionalityId: indicates a daytime thunderstorm weather condition; displays a partly sunny storm weather alert
fa-cloud-bolt-sun.intentId: check the daytime weather forecast for mixed sun and storms; be warned about afternoon lightning activity

fa-cloud-check.appearanceId: fluffy cloud shape with a checkmark overlaid on or beneath it; rounded cumulus outline combined with a tick symbol
fa-cloud-check.functionalityId: confirms a successful cloud upload or sync operation; verifies that cloud data is current and saved
fa-cloud-check.intentId: confirm that files are safely backed up to the cloud; verify a completed cloud synchronization

fa-cloud-download.appearanceId: fluffy cloud shape with a downward-pointing arrow beneath it; rounded cumulus outline with a download arrow below
fa-cloud-download.functionalityId: downloads a file or data from cloud storage to the local device; pulls content from an online source
fa-cloud-download.intentId: retrieve a file from the cloud onto the local device; save online content for offline use
